untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit ABW (Ascending Broadening Wedge) pattern detection algorithm which is not available in the allowed indicators list. Pattern recognition for broadening wedges requires multi-bar geometric analysis (widening highs and lows) that cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and oscillators. Additionally, 'yearly high/low' positioning requires annual lookback window and historical range calculations not available in the indicators set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower) as approximation for breakout detection and price_pos_20 as yearly position proxy, but this does not capture the true ABW pattern geometry. Throwback condition (50% occurrence, 9-13 day return) approximated via hold_days_max=13. Exit conditions inferred as reversals through dc_middle since author provided AUTHOR_SILENT values. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification (bull vs bear market dependent breakout direction).
